programmes.show_description: Drama series. Franky discovers who killed Mike Pennisi but ends up in even greater trouble when Ferguson intervenes. Channing sidelines Vera after investigating Jake.
The holidaymakers are arriving at the parks in their droves. In Cornwall, head of entertainment Matt decides to pit the guests against each other in a grand talent contest.
Tencreek Holiday Park in Cornwall struggles with high bookings, with every pitch practically overflowing with visitors; Crealy Theme Park and Resort in East Devon suffers as well.
The rivals have a chance to bag a high value lot which could transform their fortunes - this time it's a choice between Victorian and mid-century furniture. (Ep53)

programmes.show_description: Chilling adaptation of Susan Hill's The Small Hand, starring Dougie Henshall and Louise Lombard. An antique book dealer finds himself haunted by the ghost of a young boy. (2019)

For receptionist Denise, working the summer season means being constantly on the move, as she patrols the park to make sure incoming campers are pitched-up to perfection.

programmes.show_name: New: Battlefront: WWII Road to Victory
programmes.show_description: In 1944, U.S. forces fought a brutal battle to seize a coral island in the Kwajalein Atoll from entrenched Japanese troops, securing a vital South Pacific military base.

programmes.show_name: New: Battlefront: WWII Road to Victory
programmes.show_description: As the United States prepared for the invasion of the Philippines, scheduled for late 1944, the tiny Palau Islands had to be taken first.

programmes.show_name: How the Nazis Lost the War
programmes.show_description: Germany had few allies before WWII, and, for various reasons, those alliances were doomed to fail. Ultimately, Germany paid a heavy price for the partnerships they forged with the Axis Powers.

programmes.show_name: How the Nazis Lost the War
programmes.show_description: As Germany's resources dwindled, Hitler and Goebbels promoted Wonder Weapons as a path to victory. However, this blind belief in technology became a major hindrance to the Nazi war effort.

programmes.show_name: How the Nazis Lost the War
programmes.show_description: How did Hitler's narcotic use influence his murderous regime and delusional mindset? Did his appetite for mind-altering substances give the Allies crucial leverage in defeating the Nazi regime?
